scripts.check: biome check . && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.docs:dev: bun packages/cli/src/index.ts build docs --content-dir docs/content --output-dir docs/dist && cd apps/docs && bunx --bun vite dev
scripts.docs:build: bun packages/cli/src/index.ts build docs --content-dir docs/content --output-dir docs/dist && cd apps/docs && bunx --bun vite build
scripts.svelte-check: cd packages/viewer && bunx --bun svelte-check --threshold error && cd ../../apps/docs && bunx --bun svelte-kit sync && bunx --bun svelte-check --threshold error && cd ../../apps/preview && bunx --bun svelte-kit sync && bunx --bun svelte-check --threshold error
scripts.release: bun run check && changeset version && bun run build
